summary:
The term "Main Gate Syndrome" has no support in existing literature or established mass-casualty management frameworks such as NIMS, ICS, or standard triage procedures. There is no recognized structural or operational bottleneck referred to as a "main gate," making it unsupported by clinical or system-level evidence.  

Final Answer: B
